reviews.comment:
I tried the Bumble coffee intrigued by the name…

It was… something.

I loved the ambience, the other stuff on the menu, and the whole vibes of the aesthetic and the speciality coffee collection.

reviewReply.comment: We’re glad you enjoyed the ambience, our menu, and the overall vibe! Bumble can be quite an acquired taste, but we appreciate you giving it a try. We’d love to have you back to explore more of our specialty coffees that might match your palate perfectly.

I've visited today coffee island aipl store and had a cappuccino and freddo espresso made by suraj. It's amazing the way he served and explained about both coffee it was very smooth. I feel that coffee was worth it for me .
Must try....,
